scripts.predev: mkdir -p data/chroma && echo '✅ data/chroma dir ready'
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "chroma,server,web" --prefix-colors "blue.bold,yellow.bold,green.bold" --prefix "[{name}]" --kill-others-on-fail "chroma run --path ./data/chroma --port 8000" "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter server build
